tasks.title: Apply for Amazon Associates under mywildlifecam.com
tasks.description: Submit the Amazon Associates application using mywildlifecam.com as the apex. The site is HTTP 200, has Disclosure + Privacy + About pages — qualifies. Apply, wait 1-3 days for approval, then plug the tracking tag into scripts/add-link.ps1 calls. Application URL: https://affiliate-program.amazon.com/

subtasks.title: Add tracking tag to scripts/add-link.ps1 default calls
Backfill tag into existing KV entries

tasks.notes: Required before review #1 can earn revenue. Every Amazon link shipped without a tracking tag = unattributable click. From RAY_QUEUE.md task #2.

tasks.title: Enable Cloudflare R2 + apply for Amazon PA-API
tasks.description: Two-step toward product images. (a) Enable R2 in the CF dashboard for hero image hosting. (b) Apply for PA-API (gated on 3 qualifying Associates sales in 180 days — chicken-and-egg with the Associates application).

subtasks.title: Toggle R2 ON at dash.cloudflare.com → R2
Apply for PA-API at Associates console

tasks.notes: Workaround until R2 lands: paste Amazon image URLs into review frontmatter (images.hero: 'https://m.media-amazon.com/...'). Not bulletproof. From RAY_QUEUE.md task #4.

tasks.title: Run first real review via scripts/new-review.ps1
tasks.description: Use the scaffolding script to scaffold and publish the first actual review on mywildlifecam (hero site). Proves the Phase 2 content pipeline end-to-end.

subtasks.title: Pick the first product to review
Fill the ## My Take section (DRAFT guard catches empty)
Verify JSON-LD productSchema renders + canonical URL is right
Deploy and verify HTTP 200 on the new review URL

tasks.notes: Best done AFTER Amazon Associates approval so links earn from launch. Otherwise links cloak but earn nothing.

tasks.title: Migrate askbigchew DNS to Cloudflare
tasks.description: Walk-through doc exists at docs/askbigchew-cloudflare-migration.html. 6th sister site that needs to come under the same Cloudflare umbrella as the other 5.

subtasks.title: Open docs/askbigchew-cloudflare-migration.html and follow the click-by-click
Update apex DNS at current registrar to CF

tasks.notes: Standalone task — not blocked by anything; not blocking anything.
